# /implement

> Drive implementation for an integration feature whose tasks are validated. Emits Functions code, Logic App workflow JSON, ADF pipeline JSON, SQL scripts, and Bicep IaC under `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/output/`.

## Usage

```
/implement [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <slug>] [--complete]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md` (`TASK_VALIDATED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/integration/tdd.md`
- `project.config.yaml`
- Relevant [constitution/](../../constitution/) files per resource kind

## Execution flow

1. Build dependency DAG from tasks; topologically sort.
2. For each task:
   - Generate code / workflow / pipeline / proc per constitution conventions
   - Generate / extend matching Bicep module
   - Generate / extend test files when policy = required
   - Write under `output/{kind}/{name}/...`
3. On `--complete`:
   - Run lint per kind (ESLint / dotnet build / arm-ttk for Logic Apps / bicep build)
   - Validate `unit-test` policy
   - `currentStates += IMPLEMENTED`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/output/**`
- Task cards updated
